ddls:
CREATE TABLE "covid_data" (
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the region */,
  "admin2" TEXT /* Name of the administrative division */,
  "province_state" TEXT /* Name of the province or state */,
  "country_region" TEXT /* Name of the country or region */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "long_" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Total confirmed cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Total deaths */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Total recovered cases */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Total active cases */,
  "combined_key" TEXT /* Combined key for geographic location */,
  "incidence_rate" REAL /* Incidence rate per 100,000 people */,
  "case_fatality_ratio" REAL /* Case fatality ratio as a percentage */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population vaccinated */,
  "testing_rate" REAL /* Rate of testing per 1,000 people */,
  "hospitalization_rate" REAL /* Rate of hospitalizations per 100,000 people */,
  "icu_occupancy_rate" REAL /* Percentage of ICU beds occupied by COVID-19 patients */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent the country belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the country */,
  "healthcare_spending" REAL /* Annual healthcare spending per capita */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province/state */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Name of the province or state */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the province/state is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the province/state */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the province/state in square kilometers */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the province/state */,
  "healthcare_spending" REAL /* Annual healthcare spending per capita */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geo_locations" (
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for geographic locations */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the geographic location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the geographic location */,
  "city" TEXT /* Name of the city (if applicable) */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the geographic location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the geographic location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "vaccine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for vaccination records */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the region */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the vaccination record */,
  "total_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Total number of individuals vaccinated */,
  "doses_administered" INTEGER /* Total number of vaccine doses administered */,
  "first_dose" INTEGER /* Number of individuals with at least one dose */,
  "fully_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of individuals fully vaccinated */,
  "booster_dose" INTEGER /* Number of individuals with booster doses */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population vaccinated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_fips FOREIGN KEY ("fips") REFERENCES geo_locations ("fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for demographic records */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the area */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "income" REAL /* Average income of the population */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of gender in the population */,
  "race_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of race/ethnicity in the population */,
  "educational_attainment" TEXT /* Distribution of educational levels in the population */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate in the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_fips FOREIGN KEY ("fips") REFERENCES geo_locations ("fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_data" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for testing records */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the region */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the testing record */,
  "total_tests" INTEGER /* Total number of tests conducted */,
  "positivity_rate" REAL /* Rate of positive tests as a percentage */,
  "positive_cases" INTEGER /* Number of positive test results */,
  "negative_cases" INTEGER /* Number of negative test results */,
  "testing_rate" REAL /* Rate of testing per 1,000 people */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., PCR, antigen) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_data_fips FOREIGN KEY ("fips") REFERENCES geo_locations ("fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., public, admin, researcher) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the region accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_fips FOREIGN KEY ("fips") REFERENCES covid_data ("fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report generated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was created */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or summary of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the generated report file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notified_at" TEXT /* Time when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., data update, report generation) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the region associated with the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., spike in cases, low vaccination rate) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message detailing the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was created */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "action_required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if action is required */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_fips FOREIGN KEY ("fips") REFERENCES geo_locations ("fips")
)
